_publications._publicationTitle: Primary osteopathy of vertebrae in a neurofibromatosis type 1 murine model.

_contextSnippet: reduced cortical bone density was observed in L5 of the Nf1 and flox/flox;Col2.3Cre+ Nf1 mice...cortical bone area was significantly decreased in the L5 vertebrae
details: Reduced cortical bone density and significantly decreased cortical bone area in L5 vertebrae
